content: MEI desenquadramento: excess up to 20% (revenue up to R7,200) means desenquadramento effective January 1 of FOLLOWING year—MEI stays in regime until year end. Excess above 20% (revenue above R7,200) means retroactive desenquadramento to January 1 of CURRENT year—all taxes must be recalculated as ME in Simples Nacional with interest and penalties. Communication deadline: last business day of month following the excess event.
